alt: This is the big one - the ultimate gift for someone who has never tasted bliss in a single bite. Match made in kiwi heaven, this chocolate is going to be the rave of the party! (Good thing it's a six pack..)
title: Whittaker's Wellington Coffee Chocolate 100g (Pack of 6)
sub: Wellington knows coffee, Whittaker's knows chocolate... 'Nuff said.
